title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (valued at $7 billion), argues that startup success comes from focus and solving genuine problems rather than building on existing solutions. He emphasizes that competitive edge stems from refusal to duplicate what others do well, positioning Glean to address information search and retrieval challenges that plague teams.
